Operation 'createDelivery' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks clarity about what is returned and the side effects of creation (courier assignment, state change). Enhanced description specifies the Delivery object response, explains the optional quote_id parameter's benefit, and clarifies that this operation initiates courier assignment. Improves AI agent understanding of operation outcomes.

data.current_description: Create a new delivery between a pickup and dropoff location. A previously generated quote_id can be provided to lock in pricing.
data.description_suggestion: Create a new on-demand delivery between pickup and dropoff locations. Optionally provide a quote_id to lock in pricing from a previously generated quote. Returns a Delivery object with status, tracking information, and assigned courier details. Creates a new delivery record and initiates courier assignment.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks clarity about what is returned and the side effects of creation (courier assignment, state change). Enhanced description specifies the Delivery object response, explains the optional quote_id parameter's benefit, and clarifies that this operation initiates courier assignment. Improves AI agent understanding of operation outcomes.

message: Operation 'listDeliveries' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details. Original description is vague about available filters and pagination mechanics. Enhanced version specifies status as the filterable field with example values, clarifies the response structure (array with pagination metadata), and provides guidance on filter usage. Helps AI agents understand filtering capabilities and response format.

data.current_description: List all deliveries for a customer. Results can be filtered by status and paginated.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of all deliveries for a customer. Supports filtering by delivery status (e.g., pending, picked_up, delivered, canceled). Returns an array of Delivery objects with pagination metadata. Use status filter to retrieve deliveries in specific states.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about available filters and pagination mechanics. Enhanced version specifies status as the filterable field with example values, clarifies the response structure (array with pagination metadata), and provides guidance on filter usage. Helps AI agents understand filtering capabilities and response format.

message: Operation 'getDelivery' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Current description is minimal and doesn't specify what information is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the response includes comprehensive delivery details (status, locations, courier info, timing, manifest), helping AI agents understand the richness of data available and when to use this operation versus list operations.

data.current_description: Retrieve the details of a specific delivery by its ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a specific delivery by delivery ID. Returns a complete Delivery object including current status, pickup and dropoff locations, assigned courier information, estimated and actual delivery times, and manifest details.
data.reasoning: Current description is minimal and doesn't specify what information is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the response includes comprehensive delivery details (status, locations, courier info, timing, manifest), helping AI agents understand the richness of data available and when to use this operation versus list operations.

message: Operation 'returnDelivery' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity about the return destination and side effects. Enhanced version specifies that items return to the original pickup location, clarifies the response (updated Delivery object), and explains state changes (return status) and courier notification. Helps AI agents understand the full implications of initiating a return.

data.current_description: Initiate a return of a delivery. This can be used after the courier has picked up the items to return them to the pickup location.
data.description_suggestion: Initiate a return of a delivery after the courier has picked up the items. The items will be returned to the original pickup location. Returns an updated Delivery object with return status. This operation changes the delivery state to indicate a return is in progress and notifies the assigned courier of the return destination.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about the return destination and side effects. Enhanced version specifies that items return to the original pickup location, clarifies the response (updated Delivery object), and explains state changes (return status) and courier notification. Helps AI agents understand the full implications of initiating a return.
